$description: Artificer · Cameron's personal design system. Machine-readable token export. Mirrors artificer.css. Source of truth lives in the CSS — regenerate this file if tokens change there.

color.$description: All colors paired with their dark/light values. AAA-tuned where indicated. v0.6 palette: apothecary × deco × speakeasy.

bg.use: Base page surface. Light = ivory paper, the floor.

bgRaised.use: Cards, sidebar, raised panels. Light = champagne, lifts off ivory.

fg.use: Primary text. Bone on dark, midnight indigo on ivory.

accent.use: Burnished gold — interactive text/icons. Links, focus, secondary-button border.

accentFill.use: Deep gold fill — primary button background, badge fill, selection bg. Pair with --on-accent text.

attention.use: Dusty rose — "look when you can" text/icons. Promoted from light pink in v0.6.

attentionFill.use: Rose fill — attention badges/buttons. Pair with --on-attention text.

urgent.use: Brick — destructive, errors, blocking. Replaced vermillion in v0.6 (better separation from gold).

urgentFill.use: Brick fill — destructive buttons, urgent badges. Pair with --on-urgent text.

success.use: Apothecary green — completed states, success badges, autoAccept, merged. Replaced olive in v0.6.

steel.use: Steel blue — honest middle / chrome / secondary UI text / paths.

diffAddBg.use: Diff +added background. Derived tint of --success: same hue, knocked-down lightness.

diffDelBg.use: Diff -removed background. Derived tint of --urgent. Dimmer than diffAdd by design — destructive shouldn't out-shout success.

brand.$description: Cameron's personal signature: gold + purple. Decorative — never use semantically.

brandPurple.use: Lifted purple — text/border on dark. Replaces lilac in v0.6 (lifted, not pastel).

brandPurpleFill.use: Deep purple — surface fill, plan-mode borders, masthead background.

anchor.$description: Fixed reference colors — used inside on-color text mappings only.

ivoryRaised.use: Champagne — the lifted card. New in v0.6.

ink.use: Midnight indigo. Replaced navy #0d1b2a in v0.6 — cooler, richer, more 'ink at midnight'.

onColor.$description: Text color to use when content sits on a colored fill. Pre-checked for AAA where possible.

onSuccess.use: Text on --success. Ivory on apothecary green.

mono.value: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Berkeley Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
mono.use: Code, identifiers, numerals, dense tool body.

sans.value: 'iA Writer Quattro S', 'iA Writer Quattro', 'Iowan Old Style', 'Charter', system-ui, sans-serif
sans.use: Document body, UI labels, humanist sans.

motion.$note: All durations collapse to 0ms when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.

overlay.use: Modals, command palette, popovers. The only shadow in the system.
